leases.notes: Eureka Land Investments (landlord). Whole-house lease at 7112 Zielsdorf Drive, Webster WI. Signed 09/11/2025 by Melissa Anderson (landlord) and Valerie Alderman (KFI Staffing). Pro-rated first month $400 (8/29–8/31/25). Tenant pays ALL utilities (heat, electric, water, gas, internet, cable, phone, garbage). Separate gas + electric meters. Late fee $100 after 7 days. NSF $50. Lockout $50, lost key $25. 4 keys issued. Auto-renew month-to-month if no 45-day non-renewal notice.
leases.clauses: Early termination: 60-day notice + $8,000 termination charge. Military termination clause. Estoppel certificate within 3 days.

leases.notes: Crooked Lake 4-Plex (landlord), contact Brent Johnson. 6 Bedrooms + 1 Studio at 7666 South Shore Drive, Siren WI 54872. Signed 01/24/2024. Original 12-month term: 01/25/2024 → 01/31/2025. Now in MONTH-TO-MONTH extension (auto-renewing per Section 1) — endDate 2026-12-31 is a placeholder; either party may terminate by written notice on or before the 5th of any month, effective end of that month. Security deposit $7,000 = $500 per tenant (14 tenants). Tenant pays ALL utilities (heat, water, electric, A/C, internet). Max 2 people per room. Tenant cannot sublet or house non-employees.
leases.clauses: Section 1: Month-to-month extension since 02/01/2025. Termination notice: written, by 5th of month, effective end of that month.

GEORGE DELALLO COMPANY, INC. (landlord). 6481 US-30, Jeannette PA 15644 (AutoZone house). Effective 02/27/2026; occupancy 05/01/2026. 6-month initial term (5/1/2026 → 10/31/2026), then MONTH-TO-MONTH starting 11/01/2026. Either party may terminate the MTM by written notice on or before the 5th of any month, effective end of that month. Rent: $1,800/mo OR $300 per occupied bed per month (whichever applies based on occupancy on the 1st). Tenant pays ALL utilities. No security deposit. Lease auto-terminates if Temp Staffing Agreement ends.
leases.clauses: Tenant pays ALL utilities (heat, water, electric, A/C, internet). Max 2 people per room. No drugs/alcohol/tobacco/firearms/pets. Late fee: 5% per day on delinquent rent. Tenant covers damage costs invoiced + payable within 5 business days. KFI must carry $300k personal property + $1M liability insurance, naming Landlord as additional insured. PA jurisdiction (Allegheny / Westmoreland County). Lease auto-terminates if Temporary Employee Staffing Agreement ends. Notice to quit waived per PA Landlord-Tenant Act of 1951. Rent calc: $1,800/mo flat OR $300 per occupied bed (occupancy as of 1st of month).

Part of multi-unit lease document signed 04/15/2026 covering units 327-4, 414-3, 512-3 (12-month term 4/17/2026 → 4/30/2027). Rent: $997/mo. Security deposit equal to one month rent ($997). leases.clauses: RED BRICK HOUSE: Landlord supplies heat (as required by law) and hot/cold water for bathroom & kitchen sink. Tenant pays all electric, gas, cable, internet, telephone. leases.notes: Centerspace LP — Park Place Apartments. Apt 500-118 at 14500 34th Ave N, Plymouth MN 55447. 12-month renewal 12/1/2025 → 11/30/2026. Total monthly $1889 = $1843 apartment rent + $3 pest control + $8 utility billing admin + $35 parking (space 500-118-SSI). Apartment deposit $400.

Tenant pays direct: cable TV, sub-metered electric & gas, internet. Tenant pays landlord variable rate (RUBS): water/sewer, stormwater, trash. leases.notes: Patriot Properties / JCW Baraboo LLC — 1850 W. Pine St. Apt 509, Baraboo WI 53913. 12-month corporate lease for Milwaukee Valve workers (KFI Staffing as leaseholder). 9/30/2025 → 8/31/2026, then month-to-month. $1,675 base rent + $10.50 LLI + $4.50 admin = $1,690 billed; $1,675 net once renter's insurance proof on file. Includes attached parking stall.
leases.clauses: Landlord JCW Baraboo LLC, agent Patriot Properties (204 Moravian Valley Rd Suite N, Waunakee WI 53597 — (608) 849-6500). Rent $1,675/mo + $10.50 LLI + $4.50 admin = $1,690 billed; LLI $15 waived with proof of valid renter's insurance ($1,675 net). 12-month corporate lease for KFI Staffing housing Milwaukee Valve workers; signed by Valeria Alderman. CONCESSION: $1,675 off first month rent. KFI to notify Patriot Properties of any tenant changes. After 8/31/2026 reverts to month-to-month. 30-day written notice to vacate required. Late fee 5% of rent if paid on/after the 6th (5-day grace). NSF $35. Paper-check processing $25. Includes attached parking stall (no extra charge). Tenant responsible for transferring all utilities into their name; $50/mo service fee on any utility not transferred. Max 4 occupants per unit. Checks payable to JCW Baraboo LLC.

leases.notes: Kolbe Apartments / Lokre Companies — 1331 S 8th Ave, Apt 200, Wausau WI 54401. 6-month lease 3/27/2026 → 9/26/2026 for Schuette Metals (KFI Staffing leaseholder). Prorated first-period rent $298.23. Auto-rolls month-to-month if no 30-day notice. Tenant pays electricity (WPS); landlord covers gas/water/sewer/internet/trash.
leases.clauses: Landlord Kolbe Apartments LLC, managed by Lokre Companies (P.O. Box 215, Plover WI 54467 — (715) 342-9200). KFI Staffing LLC corporate lease for Schuette Metals workers. Late fee $75 (one-time per month) if rent not received by end of day 5; NSF/returned-payment fee $25 plus actual bank fees. Early-termination fee = 45 days rent (6–12 month leases). Auto-converts to month-to-month after term unless 30-day written notice. Landlord pays gas, water/sewer, internet, and trash; tenant is responsible for electricity (Wisconsin Public Service). Appliances supplied by landlord: refrigerator, stove/oven, dishwasher, microwave. Move-in inspection / damage notice within 7 days. Security-deposit accounting within 21 days of vacating per Wis. Stat. § 704.28.

leases.notes: Greenock Manor / Mick's Properties — 900 Seneca Court, Apt 32, McKeesport PA 15135. 12-month lease 12/1/2025 → 11/30/2026 (start date amended from original 12/1/2024). 2-bedroom / 1 bath. KFI Staffing leaseholder for Shuster's Building Components. Auto-renews 1 year w/o 60-day notice. Tenant pays electricity + all utilities except water/sewer/trash.
leases.clauses: Landlord Mick's Properties, LLC (446 Chapeldale Dr, Apollo PA 15613 — (412) 208-4262). KFI Staffing LLC corporate lease for Shuster's Building Components workers. Late fee = additional 10% of rent if unpaid after the 5th, plus another 5% if unpaid by the 20th. NSF/returned-payment fee $40. 60-day written notice required to vacate, otherwise auto-renews for another year. Early termination forfeits security deposit AND tenant remains liable for full balance of lease. Landlord pays water/sewer/trash; tenant responsible for all other utilities (must be transferred to tenant's name within 1 day of move-in or $50 doc fee + utility chargeback). Appliances supplied: range, fridge, dishwasher (unit 45-style older lease: range + fridge only). Move-out cleaning $200 + trash removal $100; key/lock fee $30 per lock if not returned. Smoke detector battery change every 6 months. No subletting.

leases.notes: Hickory Haven Apartments – 600 W Hickory St, Apt 6, Gilman WI 54433. Fixed term 2/27/2026 → 8/31/2026, $1,075/mo. Security deposit $1,075. Lease dated 2/20/2026. Auto-rolls month-to-month after 8/31/2026 with 30-day notice. M3 Insurance COI on file (units 6 & 8 covered: GL $1M occ / $2M agg, umbrella $5M, WC $1M, policy 2/4/2026 – 2/4/2027). Landlord covers HOA on this unit.
leases.clauses: Landlord Hickory Haven Apartments LLC (J. Nagel — jnagelpcc@gmail.com, (715) 290-0025; mail rent/notices to W15430 Old Hwy 194, Sheldon WI 54766). Wisconsin Residential Rental Agreement. Rent due by 5pm on the 1st. Late fee $50/day starting 5 days after the due date. NSF $40. Fixed-Term lease ending 8/31/2026; auto-rolls month-to-month after that (30-day written notice to terminate). Security deposit = one month's rent. Smoking not permitted. No pets. Tenant required to maintain renters/liability insurance. 2 keys + 2 mailbox keys per unit. Payment methods: cash, personal check, cashier's check, money order, ACH/direct deposit, or TurboTenant. KFI Staffing LLC corporate lease for WB Manufacturing workers. Utilities: tenant pays electricity, cable/satellite, internet, phone. Landlord pays gas, water, sewer, trash, landscaping, snow removal, HOA/condo fees.
